programme.title: Jersey Shore: Like More than a Friend
programme.desc: Deena & Pauly consider the consequences should they hook up. The Situation tries to take his friendship with Snooki to the next level. Ron & Sammi try to be friends but old habits die hard. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Twinning
programme.desc: With twins in the mix, it's double trouble as bi-curious Deena pulls the robbery on both The Situation and Vinny. Plus, The Situation's 'secret hook-up' with Snooki is revealed. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: The boys harass Deena for stealing a girl from Vinny's bed. Ronnie & Sammi are back to their old ways, but this time The Situation is involved in their drama. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: And the Wall Won
programme.desc: After causing drama between Ronnie & Sammi for years, The Situation comes to blows with Ronnie. But with The Situation carried out on a stretcher, have things finally gone too far? (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fist Pump, Pushups, Chapstick
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinny put on a Guido-themed comedy show, while Ron and Sammi try to patch things up. Snooki is so distraught over her long-distance relationship that JWOWW and Sammi decide to intervene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Meatball Mashup
programme.desc: S4, Ep 7. When the roommates take a trip to the Italian Shore, Snooki & Deena party so hard they wind up in bed together. Whilst back in Florence, Team Meatball has a run-in with the Italian police.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Where Is My Boyfriend?
programme.desc: The boys spring Team Meatball from the police station after their accident. And when Snooki's boyfriend Jionni comes to visit, a romantic evening ends with Snooki sobbing alone on the street.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Three Men and a Snooki
programme.desc: Deena panics after missing her period. After an all-night fight with Jionni, Snookie decides to take a break from the relationship. Mike tries to win her over, but someone else ends up comforting her.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Damage Is Done
programme.desc: After Mike's prank backfires, the guys visit Vinny's family in Sicily and the girls class it up on a Tuscan wine tour. Snooki learns the truth about her hook-up with Vin and must come clean to Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Situation Problems
programme.desc: Deena's still trying to 'do sex' with Pauly, the meatballs get an icy reception at a club, and the whole house turns on Mike after he stirs up drama one too many times. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Ciao, Italia
programme.desc: Mike's antics have proven too much and Ron demands he make amends. As the crew count down the days until their return to Seaside, Mike wonders whether or not to join them at the Shore. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 4 Reunion
programme.desc: After a summer full of popping and breaking bottles, heartache, hookups, and car-crashing, wall-smashing drama, the cast reunite to open up old wounds and say goodbye to Florence.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Hurricane Situation
programme.desc: The roommates return from Italy and couldn't be more excited to get back to the Jersey Shore. But a drama storm is brewing as Mike threatens to destroy Snooki's relationship with Jionni. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Man Down
programme.desc: Vinny weighs his options: Should he stay, or head home to Staten Island? Snooki fights with Jionni, and the roommates are back to their usual antics - partying and tanning to the extreme. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Dropping Like Flies
programme.desc: The roommates struggle to adjust to life at the Shore without Vinny, while Mike confronts his own internal demons. But it's also Pauly's birthday and he gets the best present of his life! (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Vinny
programme.desc: Mike returns only to find out that Danny has threatened to get new roommates! The girls hire strippers for Pauly and Mike's wild birthday party whilst the roomies go to kidnap Vinny. (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Nothing But Nice
programme.desc: Vinny returns and everyone celebrates. The Situation tries hard to be nice but ends up annoying the boys. Snooki struggles with an uncomfortable condition. (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Follow Game
programme.desc: The Situation secretly gathers information to bring down one of his roommates - and for once it isn't Snooki. JWOWW freaks out when Roger disappears and doesn't return her calls. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Follow Game
programme.desc: The Situation secretly gathers information to bring down one of his roommates - and for once it isn't Snooki. JWOWW freaks out when Roger disappears and doesn't return her calls. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Love at the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: One of the roommates cause drama with the Snooki and Deena, while Jenni's skimpy outfit creates a problem for Roger. A crazy night at Karma nightclub ends in a fight. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Love at the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: One of the roommates cause drama with the Snooki and Deena, while Jenni's skimpy outfit creates a problem for Roger. A crazy night at Karma nightclub ends in a fight. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Sharp Objects
programme.desc: The cast tries to avoid a shark attack when they go fishing. Jenni confronts Pauly's stalker. Snooki sets her sights on Vinny when her boyfriend rejects her affections. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Sharp Objects
programme.desc: The cast tries to avoid a shark attack when they go fishing. Jenni confronts Pauly's stalker. Snooki sets her sights on Vinny when her boyfriend rejects her affections. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.sub-title: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Mike decides he can wait no longer to reveal 'the truth' to Snooki's boyfriend. Pauly, Vinny, and Deena find it difficult to be the single roommates in the Shore House. (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.sub-title: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Mike decides he can wait no longer to reveal 'the truth' to Snooki's boyfriend. Pauly, Vinny, and Deena find it difficult to be the single roommates in the Shore House. (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Meatball Stands Alone
programme.desc: A battle royale breaks out after Mike reveals to Jionni that he hooked up with Snooki. Some of the roommates go camping, while Vinny and Pauly pull the greatest prank in Shore history! (S5, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Meatball Stands Alone
programme.desc: A battle royale breaks out after Mike reveals to Jionni that he hooked up with Snooki. Some of the roommates go camping, while Vinny and Pauly pull the greatest prank in Shore history! (S5, ep10)

programme.desc: SpongeBob, You're Fired!: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob. Unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work doing anything, anywhere.

programme.sub-title: Lost in Bikini Bottom / Tutor Sauce

programme.title: 4x4: La última tendencia en SUV
programme.desc: Los Vehículos Utilitarios Urbanos son la última tendencia en el mundo del automóvil. No están hechos para terreno sin asfaltar, pero atraen a los clientes por su diseño moderno y urbano. En este episodio, el Subaru XV muestra sus habilidades offroad y...

programme.title: 4x4: Especial Land Rover
programme.desc: El Land Rover Defender es uno de los todoterrenos más antiguos. Puede ser ruidoso e incómodo, pero es totalmente genuino por su simplicidad. Echamos un vistazo a este vehículo emblemático y a los 70 años de historia del Land Rover.

programme.title: 4x4: SUV extraordinarios
programme.desc: Este Mitsubishi Outlander Plug-In Hybrid es el primer SUV híbrido del mundo con dos motores eléctricos y un motor de dos litros. Probamos si tal combinación tiene sentido para los vehículos todoterreno. Y además: el Chevrolet Silverado...

programme.title: MTV Tuning: Chevy Pick Up 1986
programme.desc: Parece que las calles han tomado este Chevy Pick Up del '86 y, literalmente, lo han destrozado. Pero Xzibit esta a punto de tomar el auto de Heather y convertirlo en una pieza de valor.

programme.title: MTV Tuning: Mini Van
programme.desc: Tin tiene 21 años y conduce un Dodge Caravan de 1988. Veremos como Xzibit y los chicos convierten esta Mini-van en un Oasis sobre ruedas.

programme.title: MTV Tuning: Chevelle Malibú 1968
programme.desc: Cuando vimos el Chevelle Malibú de Alex, por primera vez, era un coche estaba totalmente fuera de forma. Pero los chicos de West Coast, le dieron un duro entrenamiento y lo dejaron realmente potente.

programme.title: MTV Tuning: Ford Taurus 1989
programme.desc: Cuando el Taurus de Rashae entró por primera vez aquí, era como un toro en sus últimos días. Se convirtieron las bisagras de la puerta delantera alterándolas para girar hacia arriba, estilo Lamborghini.

programme.title: Superautos: Estrellas de la carretera
programme.desc: La Silvretta Hochalpenstrasse de Austria es el patio de recreo ideal para el Lotus Elise y el Roding Roadster. Estos dos vehículos están pegados a la calle y, por ello, muy divertidos de conducir. Y además: el distinguido y potente Porsche 911 Targa 4S.

programme.title: Superautos: Caballeros corredores
programme.desc: Decir Aston Martin es pensar en James Bond, el estilo británico, el rendimiento y el lujo. El modelo Vantage N430 de la marca es un coche deportivo que hace que los conductores y los entusiastas sientan el legado de los coches de carreras británicos.

programme.title: Superautos: Conecta y conduce de lujo
programme.desc: En 2014, Mercedes-Benz presentó el S500, su primer híbrido conectable. Con un consumo medio estimado de 2,8 litros, el S500 era el coche de lujo más eficiente del mercado.

programme.title: Superautos: El RS no basta
programme.desc: Tras su lanzamiento, el Audi RS6 se convirtió en el referente de los coches familiares extremos. Su potencia y rendimiento ya eran impresionantes, pero según los tuneadores de Audi aun así era insuficiente.

programme.title: Historia del automóvil: 50 años de Porsche 911
programme.desc: El Porsche 911. Estos tres números representan la leyenda, el mito y el sentimiento. Un motor V6 trasero boxer y un diseño único lo convierten en un coche deportivo icónico. La Historia del Automóvil explica el secreto de este vehículo.

programme.title: Historia del automóvil: Audi Quattro
programme.desc: Es el coche que cambió el mundo de los coches: el Audi Quattro. Por primera vez, la tracción a las cuatro ruedas no sólo se encuentra en un coche de serie, sino también en un coche de rallye.

programme.title: Historia del automóvil: Chevrolet
programme.desc: Corvette, Camaro, Impala... ¿hay alguien que no sepa de estos coches de ensueño americanos? El foco de la historia del automóvil de hoy es, por supuesto, la historia de la marca Chevrolet y el último modelo de Chevrolet Corvette.

programme.title: Historia del automóvil: Mercedes SL
programme.desc: Desde los años 50 el Mercedes SL ha sido considerado la leyenda de los coches deportivos. Desde el legendario 300SL, la serie SL ha sido todo innovación y deportividad. SL es la abreviatura alemana de Super Leicht - super ligero.

programme.title: Classic Races: Pikes Peak
programme.desc: La subida a la colina de Pikes Peak de 1987. Un tipo de carrera bastante diferente en las montañas de Colorado, EE.UU.. Es única, fascinante y llena de aventura.

programme.title: Classic Races: Carreras del Gran Premio desde 1934
programme.desc: Desde 1934, el Gran Premio ha sido el campeonato mundial más emocionante y fascinante del mundo. Con sus vehículos de última generación, con los caballos de potencia de las marcas más grandes, nunca deja de impresionar a sus espectadores.

programme.title: Classic Races: Año de Rallye 1972 - Una historia de éxito de Ford
programme.sub-title: Año de Rallye 1972 - Una historia de éxito de Ford
programme.desc: El campeonato internacional de fabricantes fue una serie de rallyes que se desarrolló entre 1970 y 72. Fabricantes de coches como Porsche, Renault y Ford participaron, con Ford teniendo un año excepcionalmente exitoso en 1972.

programme.title: Classic Races: El Campeonato Alemán de Turismos
programme.desc: El campeonato alemán de coches de turismo de 1992: definitivamente una de las series de carreras más importantes del deporte del motor alemán. Duro, despiadado y bien conocido por las duras batallas de sus despiadados competidores.

programme.title: Dream Cars: Descapotables alemanes
programme.desc: Ya sea el Porsche 911 Cabriolet, el Audi R8 Spyder o el Mercedes SLS AMG Roadster, los descapotables alemanes gozan de una reputación mundial. Son famosos por su perfección y fiabilidad. Son considerados como la encarnación del estatus...

programme.title: Dream Cars: Supercoches italianos
programme.desc: Los Supercoches italianos son los coches más emocionantes del mundo. Ya sea el Ferrari "La Ferrari", el Lamborghini Aventador o el Pagani Huayra, son los coches más bonitos y rápidos del mundo, creados por los diseñadores más famosos.

programme.title: Dream Cars: Coupés británicos
programme.desc: Los coches deportivos ingleses son los clásicos entre los coupés, coches tan geniales como James Bond. Aston Martin, Bentley y Jaguar producen los cupés más exclusivos y elegantes del mundo.

programme.title: Dream Cars: Limusinas británicas
programme.desc: Las limusinas inglesas son la encarnación del lujo, son irresistibles e impresionantes y son la clase alta automovilística. Construidas con los materiales más caros, las limusinas inglesas como el Rolls Royce Phantom, el Bentley Mulsanne...

programme.title: MTV Tuning España: Arturo El mago - Opel Omega
programme.desc: Arturo tiene 19 años y es el dueño de un Opel Omega del 92. Estudia Publicidad y es mago, ilusionista y animador. Ha hecho muchos trabajos de voluntariado y actúa en una residencia de personas sin familia en muchas ocasiones.

programme.title: MTV Tuning España: Rubén - Peugeot 205
programme.desc: Rubén tiene 19 años y es el dueño de un Peugeot 205 del año 90. Trabaja en el campo con su padre.

programme.title: MTV Tuning España: Anais - Honda Crx
programme.desc: Anais González tiene 23 años y es la dueña de un Honda CRX Del Sol del año 93. Es dependienta en una zapatería. Le encanta ir de compras, escuchar y pinchar música y coleccionar vinilos.

programme.title: MTV Tuning España: Gemelas - Mercedes
programme.desc: Yasmina y Andrea son gemelas. Tienen 19 y son originarias de Mieres (Asturias), aunque pasan temporadas en Gijón.

programme.title: Cabezas motrices: Ferruccio Lamborghini
programme.desc: En el municipio de Sant'Agata Bolognese se encuentran las raíces de la emblemática marca italiana Lamborghini. En 1964, Ferruccio Lamborghini se propuso construir los mejores coches deportivos del mundo, un osado proyecto al hallarse a pocos km…

programme.title: Cabezas motrices: Ferry Porsche
programme.desc: El nombre de la familia Porsche lleva ligado al diseño, la fabricación y las carreras de coches desde principios del siglo XX. Tras la Segunda Guerra Mundial, y siguiendo los pasos de su padre que había sido responsable de desarrollo del clásico…

programme.title: Cabezas motrices: Walther Roehrl
programme.desc: No se puede hablar de deportes de rally sin mencionar a Walter Röhrl. Desde muy joven, Röhrl demostró su talento ganando campeonatos europeos, mundiales e internacionales de rally. Para los apasionados de las carreras, se trata de una leyenda...

programme.title: Cabezas motrices: Walther Roehrl
programme.desc: No se puede hablar de deportes de rally sin mencionar a Walter Röhrl. Desde muy joven, Röhrl demostró su talento ganando campeonatos europeos, mundiales e internacionales de rally. Para los apasionados de las carreras, se trata de una leyenda...

programme.title: Cabezas motrices: Hans-Joachim Stuck
programme.desc: Hans-Joachim Stuck es uno de los mejores pilotos de carreras de Alemania y un verdadero icono del deporte automovilístico internacional. A lo largo de su trayectoria ha ganado la Fórmula II y varios campeonatos internacionales...

programme.title: Cabezas motrices: Hans-Joachim Stuck
programme.desc: Hans-Joachim Stuck es uno de los mejores pilotos de carreras de Alemania y un verdadero icono del deporte automovilístico internacional. A lo largo de su trayectoria ha ganado la Fórmula II y varios campeonatos internacionales...

programme.title: MotorStories: El Porsche de tus sueños en San Francisco
programme.sub-title: El Porsche de tus sueños en San Francisco
programme.desc: El fan de los Porsche Marco Wendlandt hace realidad su sueño: conducir un Porsche 911 coupé de 1984. Con la ayuda del gran Mike, un vendedor de automóviles de Los Ángeles, encuentra el coche de sus sueños en San Francisco.

programme.title: MotorStories: El Porsche de tus sueños en San Francisco
programme.sub-title: El Porsche de tus sueños en San Francisco
programme.desc: El fan de los Porsche Marco Wendlandt hace realidad su sueño: conducir un Porsche 911 coupé de 1984. Con la ayuda del gran Mike, un vendedor de automóviles de Los Ángeles, encuentra el coche de sus sueños en San Francisco.

programme.title: MotorStories: El forajido de Porsche, Magnus Walker - Los Ángeles
programme.sub-title: El forajido de Porsche, Magnus Walker - Los Ángeles
programme.desc: Marco realiza un increíble viaje por carreteras californianas. Con su recién adquirido Porsche 911 coupé del 84, se dirige a Los Ángeles para conocer a uno de los entusiastas de Porsche más conocidos del mundo: Magnus Walker.

programme.title: MotorStories: El forajido de Porsche, Magnus Walker - Los Ángeles
programme.sub-title: El forajido de Porsche, Magnus Walker - Los Ángeles
programme.desc: Marco realiza un increíble viaje por carreteras californianas. Con su recién adquirido Porsche 911 coupé del 84, se dirige a Los Ángeles para conocer a uno de los entusiastas de Porsche más conocidos del mundo: Magnus Walker.

programme.title: MotorStories: Historias de coches en el alto desierto de California
programme.sub-title: Historias de coches en el alto desierto de California
programme.desc: En su viaje a Las Vegas Marco visita al gran Mike en el Apple Valley, un área alejada en el alto desierto de California, donde conocen a unos curiosos amigos que en su día fueron los que marcaron tendencia en la personalización de coches...

programme.title: MotorStories: Historias de coches en el alto desierto de California
programme.sub-title: Historias de coches en el alto desierto de California
programme.desc: En su viaje a Las Vegas Marco visita al gran Mike en el Apple Valley, un área alejada en el alto desierto de California, donde conocen a unos curiosos amigos que en su día fueron los que marcaron tendencia en la personalización de coches...

programme.title: MotorStories: Mustang: cincuenta años
programme.desc: Mustang celebra su 50 aniversario en la pista de carreras de Las Vegas y Marco decide participar de este evento especial. Además, será testigo de cómo se fabrican Shelby Cobras en exclusiva para clientes de todo el mundo.

programme.desc: Kris ajautuu riitaan Jeanin kanssa siitä, onko Wildfire valmis uuteen kilpailuun.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost of Carnegie
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to the Carnegie Library of Homestead, in Pennsylvania to investigate a site that once held violent riots between legendary capitalist, Mr. Carnegie and the steel workers. It is believed that Mr.Carnegie still haunts the library.

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the TAPS team is on Rose Island to investigate their haunted lighthouse. This island housed cholera victims exiled from Newport, and many of the sick never returned to the mainland.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science: Remnant of Blame
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science: Broken Vows
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science: Coroner's Casebook
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

credits.actor: Shawn Arledge Jean Croce Tony Ellis

programme.title: The FBI Files: Ivy League Murder
programme.desc: Etna, New Hampshire is a small town. It's the kind of place where people trust their neighbors and leave their doors unlocked. A double murder shattered that trust and left the entire community terrified.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Place To Hide
programme.desc: In Louisiana, a brutal killer turned a rural area into his personal hunting ground. He preyed on the defenseless, the weak and the elderly.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science: Family Plots
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science: Wasted Youth
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science: Mind Hunters
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Initiation
programme.desc: When gangs go to war, they don't care who gets in the way. In 1988 an innocent man was gunned down near Cleveland, Ohio, a victim of a deadly initiation.

programme.title: Critical Rescue: Critical Rescue
programme.desc: On the morning of February 28, 1997, two police officers in North Hollywood, California are on routine patrol. The officers see two heavily armed men wearing ski masks and body armor entering a bank.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science: Murderous Attraction
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science: Murderous Attraction
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene
programme.desc: When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene
programme.desc: When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Tracks of a Killer
programme.desc: From California to Kentucky, few living near a railroad felt safe in the summer of 1999. A serial killer, rode the rails, picking towns and victims at random. He left behind a trail of bloodshed, but no trace of where he would turn up next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Tracks of a Killer
programme.desc: From California to Kentucky, few living near a railroad felt safe in the summer of 1999. A serial killer, rode the rails, picking towns and victims at random. He left behind a trail of bloodshed, but no trace of where he would turn up next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Melissa Brannen: Missing
programme.desc: In 1989, residents of a close-knit apartment community in Virginia gathered for a holiday celebration. For Tammy Brannen and five-year-old daughter Melissa, Christmas was always a special time. Then without warning, the little girl was gone.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Rebellion in Paradise
programme.desc: In Puerto Rico, a band of extremists waged a guerrilla war against the United States. Their goal, to make the island an independent nation, or die trying.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science: Grave Discoveries
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutalchoosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: Ax Men: Family Tree
programme.desc: With Rygaard off to a tough start this season, Gabe is left with no choice but to call upon his son Aidan to step up and fill the family shoes. In Alaska, an overcrowded landing means one wrong move could wipe out the Papac crew below.

programme.title: Ax Men: Madman of the Mountain
programme.desc: In Washington, production's soaring with newest generation of Rygaard on the job, but with an ominous blood sun in the sky the day looks ripe for disaster. In Wyoming, David Zitterkopf is back in action with his son Levi to take on their biggest ever job.

programme.title: Ax Men: Root Canal
programme.desc: Rygaard Logging has been behind the eight ball all season, but when the crew gets surprise visit from logging legend Craig Rygaard, it's game on.

programme.title: Ax Men: Rygaard's Revenge
programme.desc: On Washington's Olympic Peninsula, Rygaard Logging is fighting to get back on track with the help of patriarch Craig Rygaard. But it's Craig's way or the highway, and his return to the mountain is rubbing some of the crew the wrong way.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jumping Asian carp have invaded Monroe's waters so Jase and the guys set out to try to stop them from spreading further. Meanwhile, Willie and Si have to run Willie's Duck Diner for the day.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The family spends a weekend at their childhood summer camp, reliving old memories and working to repair a tennis court Willie built twenty years ago. While at the camp, Jep tries to pass a lifeguard swimming test he failed as a teenager.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Rowdy's adoption is finalized and he officially becomes a Robertson. Jase gets his first massage and enjoys it more than he expected.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After Willie and Jase lose Si's teacup, Si makes them go to great lengths to find it. When the entertainment for Gus's 1st birthday party falls through, Jep fills in as a magician.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie, Korie, Jase, and Missy take dance lessons from Sadie to prepare for Reed and Rebecca's upcoming weddings. Jase's plan to perform Reed's wedding ceremony may fall through when he waits until the last minute to renew his ordainment.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Si decides to retire to pursue a music career, the family organizes a party in his honor. Meanwhile, Willie, Phil, and Jase take a road trip to try to recreate an old duck call for Si's retirement gift. (Surprise performance from ZZ Top!)

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a look back at 130 episodes of Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.sub-title: Best of Duck Dynasty: It's All Duck and Games
programme.desc: A compilation of the best scenes from all 11 seasons of A&E's hit series Duck Dynasty.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: A deadly combination of unpredictable weather on the North Slope has made Atigun Pass more dangerous than ever. Record snowfall mixed with now warmer temperatures have turned this wicked pass into a devil's slide.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With just three weeks to go, everyone is pushing it to the limit to get the freight to Deadhorse before the season ends. Lisa rushes to Carlile to pick up her next load. She's convoying north with Jack Jesse.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: There's only two weeks left to pull in the big bucks and get all the loads to the oil fields. Hugh's impatience with his trainer-driver Phil's slow pace nearly causes him to spin out on one of the steep slopes of the Atigun Pass.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With only two weeks left of the winter season, the race is on to deliver the remaining loads before the ice roads melt away. But this late in the game, truckers are besieged by mechanical breakdowns and a volcanic eruption in Southern Alaska.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers and their rigs are running ragged as they race to pull in the last loads. Lisa can't get out of the Carlile yard in Fairbanks--the trailer they've assigned her has a massive air leak.
